name: pi-edit-approval-inline-review
title: PI edit tool approval and VSCode-style diff view
description: Implement VSCode-style split-pane diff view for PI edit/write tool approval with synchronized scrolling.
creator: qzl
notes: Completed: VSCode-style diff view with left (read-only original) and right (editable proposed) panes, synchronized scrolling, real-time diff highlighting, approve/reject buttons, and bridge-side application of approved edited content.
